explanation: Inserted an escape character (\\) before the dot in the server name and added an extra backslash in the path to test path normalization and reordering. This simulates a safe mutation that may bypass the rule if it relies strictly on string matching.

Wrapped filenames in quotes and used equivalent syntax for the copy command to test if the rule can detect renamed executables with command-line arguments. This simulates a safe mutation that may bypass the rule if it relies on exact filename matching.
Used short path notation (Progra~1) for the directory name to test path normalization. This simulates a safe mutation that may bypass the rule if it relies on full path matching.

Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the rule can detect the same command with a different argument sequence. This simulates a safe mutation that may bypass the rule if it relies on fixed argument order.

Used an environment variable to store the command-line arguments to test if the rule can detect indirect command-line execution. This simulates a safe mutation that may bypass the rule if it does not inspect environment variables.
